Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys with open\(''C:/Users/tjhee/.claude/projects/D--AI-Business-Napoli/14588d93-15cb-40ac-9503-c6d6fbf1d1cd.jsonl'', ''r'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f: for line in f: try: data = json.loads\(line\) if data.get\(''type''\) == ''user'': msgs = data.get\(''message'', {}\).get\(''content'', []\) for m in msgs: if isinstance\(m, dict\) and m.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': text = m.get\(''text'', ''''\) if ''Mistake 2'' in text or ''ham.*swiss'' in text or ''7.75'' in text: print\(text[:3000]\) print\(''---''\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys with open\(''C:/Users/tjhee/.claude/projects/D--AI-Business-Napoli/14588d93-15cb-40ac-9503-c6d6fbf1d1cd.jsonl'', ''r'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f: for line in f: try: data = json.loads\(line\) if data.get\(''type''\) == ''user'': msgs = data.get\(''message'', {}\).get\(''content'', []\) for m in msgs: if isinstance\(m, dict\) and m.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': text = m.get\(''text'', ''''\) if ''Mistake'' in text and ''17'' in text: print\(text[:5000]\) break except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json with open\(''C:/Users/tjhee/.claude/projects/D--AI-Business-Napoli/14588d93-15cb-40ac-9503-c6d6fbf1d1cd.jsonl'', ''r'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f: lines = f.readlines\(\) print\(f''Total lines: {len\(lines\)}''\) # Try to find user messages for i, line in enumerate\(lines[-50:], len\(lines\)-50\): try: data = json.loads\(line\) t = data.get\(''type'', ''''\) print\(f''Line {i}: type={t}''\) except: pass ")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const txt=fs.readFileSync\(''PromptID.json'',''utf8''\); const pos=7464; const chars=[]; for\(let i=pos-2;i<=pos+5;i++\) chars.push\(txt.charCodeAt\(i\)+'':''+txt[i]\); console.log\(chars.join\('' ''\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); let txt=fs.readFileSync\(''PromptID.json'',''utf8''\); const badStart=txt.indexOf\(''\\u201cASK_SANDWICH_FORMAT_MULTI\\u201d''\); console.log\(''badStart=''+badStart\); if\(badStart>=0\) { const fixed=txt.slice\(0,badStart\)+''""ASK_SANDWICH_FORMAT_MULTI""''+txt.slice\(badStart+28\); fs.writeFileSync\(''PromptID.json'',fixed,''utf8''\); console.log\(''Fixed!''\); } else console.log\(''Not found''\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const txt=fs.readFileSync\(''PromptID.json'',''utf8''\); try { JSON.parse\(txt\); console.log\(''JSON valid''\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''JSON error: ''+e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const txt=fs.readFileSync\(''PromptID.json'',''utf8''\); const start=7462; const end=7700; const s=txt.slice\(start,end\); const codes=[]; for\(let i=0;i<s.length;i++\) if\(s.charCodeAt\(i\)>127\) codes.push\(i+start+'':''+s.charCodeAt\(i\)+''\(''+s[i]+''\)''\); console.log\(codes.join\(''\\n''\)\);")
